英國英格蘭史洛普爾肯普頓
zh.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Thompson是William Thompson和Mrs Thompson的女兒，於大約1263年出生在英國越可爾曼諾。她於大約1282年與Sir, Ralph Andrews , I在英國波藍德卡萊爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世在她的家鄉。

英国英格兰史洛普爾肯普頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Thompson是William Thompson和Mrs Thompson的女儿，于大约1263年出生在英国越可爾曼諾。她于大约1282年与Sir, Ralph Andrews , I在英国波藍德卡萊爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Thompson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me) (see Thom ) + -son ‘son of Tom’. Thomson is usually the Scottish form, that with the intrusive -p- being English. Both forms are common in Ireland. The surname Thompson is also very common among African Americans.
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German Thomsen and of its Swedish cognate Thomsson. Compare Thomson .

variants.name: Thomson
meanings: Scottish, English and northern Irish: variant of   Thompson  .
Scottish: sometimes an Anglicized form of Gaelic McThomas; see McTavish , McComish .
Americanized form of Danish, Norwegian, and North German   Thomsen  . Compare   Thompson  .

variants.name: Thom
meanings: Scottish and English: from the Middle English personal name T(h)om(me), a pet form of Thomas . In Scotland, Thom is also an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Thom, see McComb .
German: from the personal name Thom, a pet form of Thomas . This surname is also found in France.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 譚, see   Tan   1.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Thompson was born about 1263, in Manor, Yorkshire, England as the daughter of William Thompson and Mrs Thompson. She married Sir, Ralph Andrews , I about 1282, in Carlisle, Cumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Thompson est née environ 1263, à Manor, Everwyck, Angleterre, fille de William Thompson et Mrs Thompson. Elle a épousé Sir, Ralph Andrews , I environ 1282, à Carlisle, Cumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Thompson wurde um 1263 in Manor, Yorkshire, England, als Tochter von William Thompson und Mrs Thompson geboren. Sie hat um 1282 in Carlisle, Cumberland, England Sir, Ralph Andrews , I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Thompson è nata il circa 1263 nel Manor, Yorkshire, England come figlia di William Thompson e Mrs Thompson. Lei sposato Sir, Ralph Andrews , I circa 1282, nel Carlisle, Cumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Thompsonは約1263年にイギリスヨークシュアイアマノーでWilliam ThompsonとMrs Thompsonの娘として生まれた。約1282年にイギリスクウンバーランドカーリスルでSir, Ralph Andrews , Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Thompson(은)는 대략 1263년 영국 요르크실르 먼어에서 William Thompson(와)과 Mrs Thompson의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1282년 영국 c벌랜드 칼리슬일에서 Sir, Ralph Andrews , I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

Kempton, Salopesberia, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Thompson nasceu aproximadamente 1263, em Manor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra filha de William Thompson e Mrs Thompson. Ela casou-se com Sir, Ralph Andrews , I aproximadamente 1282, em Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Thompson родилась около 1263 г. в местности манор, еркшир, Англия. Её родителей звали William Thompson и Mrs Thompson. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir, Ralph Andrews , I около 1282 г. в местности карлисл, кумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в её родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Mary Thompson nació aproximadamente 1263, en Manor, Yorkshire, Inglaterra como hija de William Thompson y Mrs Thompson. Se casó con Sir, Ralph Andrews , I aproximadamente 1282, en Carlisle, Cumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en su pueblo.
